'''fogawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombied|zombied]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombied|zombied]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fogawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogawithi|fogawithi]] || [[word:fogawiji|fogawiji]] || [[word:fogawishi|fogawishi]] || [[word:fogawiki|fogawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogawuthuthu|fogawuthuthu]] || [[word:fogawujuju|fogawujuju]] || [[word:fogawushushu|fogawushushu]] || [[word:fogawukuku|fogawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogawuthu|fogawuthu]] || [[word:fogawuju|fogawuju]] || [[word:fogawushu|fogawushu]] || [[word:fogawuku|fogawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogawufthuf|fogawufthuf]] || [[word:fogawufjuf|fogawufjuf]] || [[word:fogawufshuf|fogawufshuf]] || [[word:fogawufkuf|fogawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogawethe|fogawethe]] || [[word:fogaweje|fogaweje]] || [[word:fogaweshe|fogaweshe]] || [[word:fogaweke|fogaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogawothotho|fogawothotho]] || [[word:fogawojojo|fogawojojo]] || [[word:fogawoshosho|fogawoshosho]] || [[word:fogawokoko|fogawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogawotho|fogawotho]] || [[word:fogawojo|fogawojo]] || [[word:fogawosho|fogawosho]] || [[word:fogawoko|fogawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogawofthof|fogawofthof]] || [[word:fogawofjof|fogawofjof]] || [[word:fogawofshof|fogawofshof]] || [[word:fogawofkof|fogawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfthÃŸf|fogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfjÃŸf|fogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfshÃŸf|fogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfkÃŸf|fogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fogawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fogawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fogawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fogawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfthÃŸf|fogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfjÃŸf|fogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfshÃŸf|fogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfkÃŸf|fogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfthÃŸf|fogawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfjÃŸf|fogawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfshÃŸf|fogawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogawÃŸfkÃŸf|fogawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogawÃḊthÃḊ|fogawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fogawÃḊjÃḊ|fogawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fogawÃḊshÃḊ|fogawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fogawÃḊkÃḊ|fogawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogawathatha|fogawathatha]] || [[word:fogawajaja|fogawajaja]] || [[word:fogawashasha|fogawashasha]] || [[word:fogawakaka|fogawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogawatha|fogawatha]] || [[word:fogawaja|fogawaja]] || [[word:fogawasha|fogawasha]] || [[word:fogawaka|fogawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogawafthaf|fogawafthaf]] || [[word:fogawafjaf|fogawafjaf]] || [[word:fogawafshaf|fogawafshaf]] || [[word:fogawafkaf|fogawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fogawasha|fogawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogawshÃḋsha|fogawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogawrosha|fogawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogawmusha|fogawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogawyasha|fogawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogawnkshÃḋsha|gofogawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogawnkrosha|gofogawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogawnkmusha|gofogawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogawnkyasha|gofogawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fogagawasha|fogagawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogagawshÃḋsha|fogagawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogagawrosha|fogagawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogagawmusha|fogagawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogagawyasha|fogagawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogagawnkshÃḋsha|gofogagawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogagawnkrosha|gofogagawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogagawnkmusha|gofogagawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogagawnkyasha|gofogagawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fegÃḊwasha|fegÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fegÃḊwshÃḋsha|fegÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fegÃḊwrosha|fegÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fegÃḊwmusha|fegÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fegÃḊwyasha|fegÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofegÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gofegÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofegÃḊwnkrosha|gofegÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofegÃḊwnkmusha|gofegÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofegÃḊwnkyasha|gofegÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fogfawasha|fogfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogfawshÃḋsha|fogfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogfawrosha|fogfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogfawmusha|fogfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogfawyasha|fogfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogfawnkshÃḋsha|gofogfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogfawnkrosha|gofogfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogfawnkmusha|gofogfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogfawnkyasha|gofogfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
